Code fragment: public final TableField<TransactionRecord, Double> AMOUNT = createField(DSL.name("AMOUNT"), org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.DOUBLE, this, "");
Explanation: The AMOUNT column uses DOUBLE type which can cause rounding errors when storing monetary values. Use DECIMAL or NUMERIC with appropriate precision and scale (e.g., DECIMAL(19,4)) to ensure accurate financial calculations.
